narrative:
Munroe Falls 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,139 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
